funding.purpose: Funding supports the development and sustainability of Caracal Open Source.
terms: Sponsorship does not grant ownership, governance rights, roadmap influence, feature guarantees, commercial privileges, or support obligations unless explicitly agreed to by the CODEOWNERS (.github/CODEOWNERS).
Sponsors may be acknowledged publicly as supporters of the project.
Any commitments beyond public sponsorship recognition are made solely at the discretion of the CODEOWNERS and must be communicated separately.
